panorama/layout/dashboard.xml.xml: <Panel id='XmlInspectorButtonsContainer'><Button id='XmlInspectorBtn' class='XmlInspectorButton' onactivate='ToggleXmlInspectorPopup()' onmouseover='UIShowTextTooltip( ' XML Inspector (Filtered) ' )' onmouseout='UIHideTextTooltip()'><Label text='<XML>' /></Button><Button id='XmlInspectorAllBtn' class='XmlInspectorButton' onactivate='ToggleXmlInspectorAllPopup()' onmouseover='UIShowTextTooltip( ' XML Inspector (All) ' )' onmouseout='UIHideTextTooltip()'><Label text='<ALL>' /></Button><Button id='XmlInspectBtn' class='XmlInspectButton' onactivate='ToggleInspectMode()' onmouseover='UIShowTextTooltip( ' Inspect (RMB to Capture) ' )' onmouseout='UIHideTextTooltip()'><Label text='INS' /></Button><Button id='XmlBlacklistBtn' class='XmlBlacklistButton' onactivate='ToggleBlacklistPanel()' onmouseover='UIShowTextTooltip( ' Blacklist ' )' onmouseout='UIHideTextTooltip()'><Label text='BL' /></Button></Panel>
